description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a wooden fixed stock, wooden handguard, and a curved detachable magazine. The receiver and barrel are constructed from dark metal, giving it a robust and utilitarian appearance. The rifle features standard iron sights, with a front post and a rear notch, both mounted on the top of the barrel and receiver. The muzzle end appears to have a simple slant compensator or flash hider. The trigger, magazine release, and safety lever are all visible, indicating standard manual operation. The overall design is reminiscent of the iconic AK-47, known for its reliability and widespread use in urban and military environments.
description: A classic assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, dark metal receiver, and a curved detachable magazine. It features iron sights and a simple muzzle device.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from above, showing the slim profile of the barrel, receiver, and wooden stock, with the magazine and iron sights visible.
description_view_1: A full side view reveals the wooden fixed stock, handguard, curved magazine, and the entire length of the barrel with iron sights and a muzzle device.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from below, highlighting the underside of the magazine, trigger guard, and the alignment of the wooden components.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the same features as view 1, with the safety lever and ejection port more visible on the receiver.
